name: birthday_party_invitation

input.subject: You're invited to Jake's 7th Birthday!
input.body_text:
Hi! You're invited to Jake's 7th birthday party! 

Date: Saturday, February 15th, 2026
Time: 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM
Location: 123 Oak Street, Springfield

Please RSVP by February 10th. Looking forward to seeing you there!

Best,
Sarah
